title: SequenceFile Management in MapReduce
description: The 'lib/output/committer' directory in Hadoop MapReduce is responsible for managing 'FileEntry' objects. It utilizes 'EntryFileIO' for SequenceFile operations, ensuring efficient file entry management. The 'EntryWriter' class, employing Factory and Worker patterns, guarantees data integrity and consistency. This directory collaborates with other classes, demonstrating a Layered Architecture. It plays a crucial role in maintaining data consistency during MapReduce processes.
